title: Getting Started with Legend in the Mist
description: A guided introduction to the Legend in the Mist system.

steps.title: Welcome to Legend in the Mist
steps.content: This tour will show you where everything lives and how to use it. It takes about two minutes.

steps.title: Creating Your Hero
steps.content: Heroes are stored in the Actors sidebar. Click the create button at the top, choose Hero as the type, give it a name, and open it. The next few steps will walk you through the sheet.

steps.title: The Hero Sheet
steps.content: This is your hero sheet. It has three columns: relationships, Promise track, and Quintessences on the left; your four theme cards in the scrollable centre; and statuses, story tags, backpack, and fellowship tags on the right.

steps.title: Theme Cards
steps.content:
Each theme card holds a title tag at the top, power tags, weakness tags, a quest, and a development track. Fill these in to define who your hero is and what they can do.

Click the border of any tag to scratch it. Scratched tags can't be used in a roll.

steps.title: Edit Mode
steps.content: Click the pencil icon to enter edit mode. In edit mode you can rename tags, add new ones, fill in your quest, and make other changes. Click it again to lock the sheet and prevent accidental edits.

steps.title: Rolling Dice
steps.content: Click the Roll button to open the Roll Panel. In the panel, click tags to add them to your roll and watch the power total update. When you're ready, click Roll to throw the dice. The result posts to chat with all your tags and the outcome.

steps.title: Theme Books, Kits & Tropes
steps.content:
Theme books, kits, and tropes live in the Items sidebar. To apply a kit to a hero, open the hero sheet, enter edit mode, and click Apply Kit on one of the theme cards. To apply a full trope, click Apply Trope in the sheet header.

Your GM can import theme content from a JSON file using the Import Themes button at the top of this sidebar.

steps.title: Party Overview
steps.content: Click Party Overview to open a panel showing all heroes at a glance: portraits, weakness tags, quests, and statuses. Click any card to open that hero's sheet.

steps.title: The Oracle
steps.content: Click Oracle to open the oracle tables. Pick a table, choose any options in the dropdown, and hit Roll. Results post to chat. Your GM imports the oracle data from a JSON file.

steps.title: Scene Tracker
steps.content:
Click Scene Tracker to open the scene panel. Use + Add to create story tags and statuses, and + Link challenge to attach a Challenge actor. Toggle between Prep and Live in the header to control what players see.

When a player opens the Roll Panel, click any tag or status in the tracker to contribute it directly to their roll.

steps.title: Camping Scene
steps.content: Click Camping Scene to open the downtime panel. Set each hero's activity, check off backpack items to expire them, and handle fellowship recovery. Click Pack Up & Go to apply all changes at once and post a summary to chat.

steps.title: That's the System
steps.content:
You're all set. Everything you need is in the sidebar and the toolbar on the left.

You can reopen this tour any time by clicking the Tour button in the Legend in the Mist toolbar.
